## NotebookSource type

A source to add to a notebook.

Future source kinds (e.g. `"drive" | "youtube" | "upload"`<!-- -->) will extend this union.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type NotebookSource = {
    readonly kind: "text";
    readonly title?: string;
    readonly content: string;
} | {
    readonly kind: "url";
    readonly url: string;
};
```
